parsed.production_notes: The character's facial movements, particularly the lip-sync and eye blinks, have a slightly unnatural, robotic quality typical of AI avatars. The lighting is perfectly even and static, and the character explicitly introduces herself as an AI tutor.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has straight red hair cut in a bob, green eyes, and noticeable freckles across her nose and cheeks.
characters.wardrobe: A brown ribbed top with a square neckline and a simple pearl necklace.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, direct, and engaging, maintaining constant eye contact with the camera.

scenes.setting: A featureless, bright white background. The lighting is even and flat.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned in the center of the frame, looking directly into the camera. She has straight red hair in a bob, fair skin with freckles, and green eyes. She is wearing a brown ribbed top with a square neckline and a pearl necklace. The background behind her is completely white and featureless. The lighting is bright and even, illuminating her face clearly without harsh shadows. She appears to be speaking.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A speaking directly to the camera against a plain white background. Dynamic, word-by-word text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen, highlighting the words as she speaks them.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Every day you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor, and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen.
scenes.on_screen_text: everyday you don't practice speaking English you stay exactly where you are I'm Loora your AI English tutor and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen

scenes.setting: A featureless, bright white background. The lighting is even and flat.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains centered in the frame, maintaining direct eye contact with the camera. She has straight red hair in a bob, fair skin with freckles, and green eyes. She is wearing a brown ribbed top with a square neckline and a pearl necklace. The background is a solid, bright white. The lighting is consistent, bright, and even across her face. She continues to speak.

scenes.visual_description: The same continuous close-up shot of Character A speaking to the camera. The plain white background remains unchanged. Dynamic text overlays continue to appear at the bottom of the screen, matching her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: With me, you get real conversations anytime, anywhere. No scheduling, no awkwardness. Just you and me, talking. I give you instant feedback on your mistakes. Not after the conversation, during it. So your brain connects the correction to the moment, and you actually remember it next time.
scenes.on_screen_text: with me you get real conversations anytime anywhere no scheduling no awkwardness just you and me talking I give you instant feedback on your mistakes not after the conversation during it so your brain connects the correction to the moment and you actually remember it next time

scenes.setting: A featureless, bright white background. The lighting is even and flat.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in the frame, looking straight at the camera. She has straight red hair in a bob, fair skin with freckles, and green eyes. She is wearing a brown ribbed top with a square neckline and a pearl necklace. The background is entirely white and featureless. The lighting is bright and even. She is speaking.

scenes.visual_description: The continuous close-up shot of Character A concludes as she delivers the final call to action. The background is still plain white. Dynamic text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen, synchronized with her words.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference. 10 minutes, and you'll wonder why you waited this long. Let's practice together, right now.
scenes.on_screen_text: five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference 10 minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long let's practice together right now
